title: Solid Powder Blue Square Paper Dinner Plates (22cm) Pack of 14 - Elegant Design, Perfect for Parties and Events
features: ELEGANT POWDER BLUE SQUARE DESIGN: Add a touch of sophistication and luxury to your next event with our solid powder blue square paper dinner plates, featuring an eye-catching artistic design that perfectly complements any party or special occasion.

DURABLE & HIGH-QUALITY PAPER: Crafted from premium, food-grade paper material, these 22cm dinner plates are designed to withstand heavy loads without bending or tearing, ensuring your guests can enjoy delectable dishes worry-free.

CONVENIENT PACK OF 14: This party-ready set includes 14 powder blue square paper plates, making it easy for you to cater to various gatherings and celebrations – whether it's an intimate dinner party or a grand festive occasion.

ECO-FRIENDLY & DISPOSABLE: Hassle-free clean up with our disposable paper plates, which are also eco-friendly, allowing you to reduce the environmental impact of your event while still indulging in elegance and glamour.

PERFECT FOR PARTIES & EVENTS: Impress your guests with these stylish dinner plates, ideal for birthdays, weddings, anniversaries, holiday gatherings, and more – let our square paper dinner plates elevate your party's aesthetic and atmosphere.
